TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
204 
MFP_PRTCPTN_END_RSN_CD 
LABEL: 
Money Follows Person (MFP) -Participation Ended Reason Code 
DESCRIPTION: A code describing reason why a beneficiary’s participation in the Money Follows the Person 
Demonstration ended; most recent in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: MFP_PRTCPTN_END_RSN_CD 
LONG NAME: MFP_PRTCPTN_END_RSN_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR
